productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Black White Shoe
description: Chic and stylish, this pair of canvas shoes from numero uno is light and comfortable on the feet. Team this with skirts or jeans for a cool, casual look. This shoe comes with an extra pair of coloured laces to give a different look.Upper Canvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Stitch detailing for durability and style Long tongue for comfort Lace-up system for snug Fit Durable rubber toe box with vertical ridges for forefoot protection and easy cleaning Branding appliquéd on tongue and lateral midfoot for style Midsole Phylon midsole for durability and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Cambreel lining the soft padded insole for excellent arch support PU foxing for the toe box Brand name embossed on the heel Outsole Ridged outsole in durable rubber for maximum traction and grip Shoe careKnock off loose dirt by smacking the sneakers togetherWipe with a damp cloth to remove caked dirtRinse shoes with warm waterScrub with mild detergent using a gentle toothbrushUse a non-bleaching soap for coloured canvasRinse off with cool water
